---
title: "Explora Eventos Culturales en la CDMX"
format:
  dashboard:
    theme: cyborg
    css: styles.css
    nav-buttons:
      - icon: github
        href: https://github.com/dar4datascience/AWS-SAM-Cultura-CDMX
execute:
  echo: false
---

```{python}
#| output: false
import gzip
import shutil
import urllib.request
import tempfile
import duckdb
import json

url = "https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/dar4datascience/AWS-SAM-Cultura-CDMX@main/data/scraped_data_cultura_cartelera_cdmx.parquet"

# Download and decompress the parquet
with urllib.request.urlopen(url) as response:
    with tempfile.NamedTemporaryFile(delete=False, suffix=".parquet") as tmp_parquet:
        with gzip.GzipFile(fileobj=response) as unzipped:
            shutil.copyfileobj(unzipped, tmp_parquet)
        parquet_path = tmp_parquet.name

# Query decompressed file using DuckDB
con = duckdb.connect()
df = con.execute(f"""
  SELECT
    evento,
    recinto,
    schedule.date  AS fecha_raw,
    schedule.hour  AS hora,
    location,
    banner_url,
    detail_url,
    list_aggregate(description, 'string_agg', ' ')   AS descripcion,
    list_aggregate(info,        'string_agg', ' | ') AS info_text
  FROM read_parquet('{parquet_path}')
  ORDER BY schedule.date
""").df()

df = df.fillna("")

# Serialize to events.json so Quarto OJS can bundle it as a FileAttachment
events = df.to_dict(orient="records")
with open("events.json", "w", encoding="utf-8") as f:
    json.dump(events, f, ensure_ascii=False)
```

```{ojs}
//| output: false

// ── 1. Load pre-processed JSON ───────────────────────────────────────────────
rawEvents = FileAttachment("events.json").json()

allEvents = {
  const MESES = {
    enero:1, febrero:2, marzo:3, abril:4, mayo:5, junio:6,
    julio:7, agosto:8, septiembre:9, octubre:10, noviembre:11, diciembre:12
  };
  function parseDate(raw) {
    if (!raw) return "";
    const m = raw.match(/(\d{1,2})\s+De\s+(\w+)\s+De\s+(\d{4})/i);
    if (!m) return "";
    const day = m[1].padStart(2,"0");
    const mon = String(MESES[m[2].toLowerCase()] || 0).padStart(2,"0");
    const yr  = m[3];
    return `${yr}-${mon}-${day}`;
  }
  return rawEvents.map(r => ({ ...r, fecha_iso: parseDate(r.fecha_raw) }));
}

// Sorted unique ISO dates that have events (for calendar dots)
eventDates = new Set(allEvents.map(e => e.fecha_iso).filter(Boolean))

// ── 2. Mutable state for calendar ────────────────────────────────────────────
// Helper: get current week (Mon-Sun)
currentWeek = {
  const now = new Date();
  const day = now.getDay();
  const diff = day === 0 ? -6 : 1 - day; // Mon = 1, Sun = 0
  const monday = new Date(now);
  monday.setDate(now.getDate() + diff);
  const sunday = new Date(monday);
  sunday.setDate(monday.getDate() + 6);
  const fmt = d => `${d.getFullYear()}-${String(d.getMonth()+1).padStart(2,'0')}-${String(d.getDate()).padStart(2,'0')}`;
  return { start: fmt(monday), end: fmt(sunday) };
}

mutable calMode    = "range"   // "range" | "days"
mutable rangeStart = currentWeek.start
mutable rangeEnd   = currentWeek.end
mutable selectedDays = new Set()
mutable calYear    = parseInt(currentWeek.start.slice(0,4))
mutable calMonth   = parseInt(currentWeek.start.slice(5,7)) - 1

// ── 3. Reactive filtered dataset ────────────────────────────────────────────
filtered = {
  const q = searchText.trim().toLowerCase();
  return allEvents.filter(e => {
    if (q) {
      const hay = `${e.evento||""} ${e.recinto||""} ${e.descripcion||""} ${e.info_text||""} ${e.location||""}`.toLowerCase();
      if (!hay.includes(q)) return false;
    }
    if (calMode === "range" && (rangeStart || rangeEnd)) {
      const d = e.fecha_iso;
      if (!d) return false;
      const lo = rangeStart && rangeEnd ? Math.min(rangeStart, rangeEnd) : rangeStart;
      const hi = rangeStart && rangeEnd ? Math.max(rangeStart, rangeEnd) : null;
      if (lo && d < lo) return false;
      if (hi && d > hi) return false;
      if (lo && !hi && d !== lo) return false;
    } else if (calMode === "days" && selectedDays.size > 0) {
      if (!selectedDays.has(e.fecha_iso)) return false;
    }
    return true;
  });
}
```

# {.sidebar}

```{ojs}
// ── 4. Search input ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
viewof searchText = Inputs.text({
  placeholder: "Buscar evento o recinto…",
  width: "100%"
})
```

---

```{ojs}
// ── 5. Calendar widget ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────
calendarWidget = {
  const MONTH_NAMES = ["Enero","Febrero","Marzo","Abril","Mayo","Junio",
                       "Julio","Agosto","Septiembre","Octubre","Noviembre","Diciembre"];
  const DAY_NAMES   = ["Dom","Lun","Mar","Mié","Jue","Vie","Sáb"];

  function isoToDisplay(iso) {
    if (!iso) return "";
    const [y,mo,d] = iso.split("-");
    return `${d}/${mo}/${y}`;
  }

  function renderGrid() {
    const yr  = calYear;
    const mo  = calMonth;
    const firstDay    = new Date(yr, mo, 1).getDay();
    const daysInMonth = new Date(yr, mo + 1, 0).getDate();

    let cells = DAY_NAMES.map(d =>
      htl.html`<div class="cal-head">${d}</div>`
    );
    for (let i = 0; i < firstDay; i++) {
      cells.push(htl.html`<div class="cal-cell empty"></div>`);
    }
    for (let d = 1; d <= daysInMonth; d++) {
      const iso = `${yr}-${String(mo+1).padStart(2,"0")}-${String(d).padStart(2,"0")}`;
      const lo = rangeStart && rangeEnd
        ? (rangeStart < rangeEnd ? rangeStart : rangeEnd)
        : rangeStart;
      const hi = rangeStart && rangeEnd
        ? (rangeStart < rangeEnd ? rangeEnd   : rangeStart)
        : null;

      const classes = [
        "cal-cell",
        eventDates.has(iso)     ? "has-event"    : "",
        calMode === "range" && lo && iso === lo  ? "range-start"  : "",
        calMode === "range" && hi && iso === hi  ? "range-end"    : "",
        calMode === "range" && lo && hi && iso > lo && iso < hi ? "in-range" : "",
        calMode === "days"  && selectedDays.has(iso) ? "selected-day" : ""
      ].filter(Boolean).join(" ");

      const cell = htl.html`<div class=${classes}>${d}</div>`;
      cell.addEventListener("click", () => {
        if (calMode === "range") {
          if (!rangeStart || (rangeStart && rangeEnd)) {
            mutable rangeStart = iso;
            mutable rangeEnd   = null;
          } else {
            mutable rangeEnd = iso;
          }
        } else {
          const next = new Set(selectedDays);
          next.has(iso) ? next.delete(iso) : next.add(iso);
          mutable selectedDays = next;
        }
        container.replaceChildren(...buildWidget());
      });
      cells.push(cell);
    }
    return cells;
  }

  function buildWidget() {
    // Mode toggle bar
    const btnRange = htl.html`<button class="mode-btn ${calMode==="range"?"active":""}">Rango</button>`;
    const btnDays  = htl.html`<button class="mode-btn ${calMode==="days" ?"active":""}">Días</button>`;
    const btnClear = htl.html`<button class="mode-btn clear-btn">✕ Limpiar</button>`;

    btnRange.onclick = () => { mutable calMode = "range"; container.replaceChildren(...buildWidget()); };
    btnDays.onclick  = () => { mutable calMode = "days";  container.replaceChildren(...buildWidget()); };
    btnClear.onclick = () => {
      mutable rangeStart   = null;
      mutable rangeEnd     = null;
      mutable selectedDays = new Set();
      container.replaceChildren(...buildWidget());
    };

    const toggleBar = htl.html`<div class="calendar-mode-toggle">${btnRange}${btnDays}${btnClear}</div>`;

    // Hint text
    let hintText = "";
    if (calMode === "range") {
      if (!rangeStart)     hintText = "Selecciona fecha de inicio";
      else if (!rangeEnd)  hintText = "Ahora selecciona fecha de fin";
      else                 hintText = `${isoToDisplay(rangeStart)} → ${isoToDisplay(rangeEnd)}`;
    } else {
      hintText = selectedDays.size > 0
        ? `${selectedDays.size} día(s) seleccionado(s)`
        : "Haz clic en uno o más días";
    }
    const hint = htl.html`<div class="cal-hint">${hintText}</div>`;

    // Navigation
    const prevBtn = htl.html`<button class="cal-nav-btn">‹</button>`;
    const nextBtn = htl.html`<button class="cal-nav-btn">›</button>`;
    prevBtn.onclick = () => {
      let m = calMonth - 1, y = calYear;
      if (m < 0) { m = 11; y--; }
      mutable calMonth = m;
      mutable calYear  = y;
      container.replaceChildren(...buildWidget());
    };
    nextBtn.onclick = () => {
      let m = calMonth + 1, y = calYear;
      if (m > 11) { m = 0; y++; }
      mutable calMonth = m;
      mutable calYear  = y;
      container.replaceChildren(...buildWidget());
    };
    const nav = htl.html`<div class="calendar-nav">${prevBtn}<span class="cal-month-label">${MONTH_NAMES[calMonth]} ${calYear}</span>${nextBtn}</div>`;

    // Grid
    const grid = htl.html`<div class="calendar-grid">${renderGrid()}</div>`;

    return [toggleBar, hint, nav, grid];
  }

  const container = htl.html`<div class="calendar-container"></div>`;
  container.replaceChildren(...buildWidget());
  return container;
}
```

---

```{ojs}
// ── Selection counter + Export button (static HTML, updated by table JS) ─────
selectionWidget = {
  function generateICal() {
    const state = window.__eventSelection;
    if (!state) return;
    const events = Array.from(state.selected).map(idx => state.filtered[idx]).filter(Boolean);
    if (events.length === 0) return;

    function escapeIcal(str) {
      if (!str) return "";
      return str.replace(/\\/g, "\\\\")
                .replace(/;/g, "\\;")
                .replace(/,/g, "\\,")
                .replace(/\n/g, "\\n");
    }

    function hashCode(s) {
      let h = 0;
      for (let i = 0; i < s.length; i++) {
        h = ((h << 5) - h) + s.charCodeAt(i);
        h |= 0;
      }
      return Math.abs(h).toString(16);
    }

    let ical = [
      "BEGIN:VCALENDAR",
      "VERSION:2.0",
      "PRODID:-//Cultura CDMX//Eventos//ES",
      "CALSCALE:GREGORIAN",
      "METHOD:PUBLISH",
      "X-WR-CALNAME:Eventos Culturales CDMX",
      "X-WR-TIMEZONE:America/Mexico_City"
    ];

    for (const e of events) {
      const uid = hashCode((e.detail_url || "") + (e.fecha_iso || "")) + "@cultura-cdmx";
      const summary = escapeIcal(e.evento || "Evento");
      const location = escapeIcal(e.location || "");
      const description = escapeIcal(
        (e.descripcion || "") + (e.info_text ? "\n\n" + e.info_text : "")
      );
      const url = e.detail_url || "";

      let dtstart, dtend;
      if (e.fecha_iso && e.hora) {
        const [yr, mo, dy] = e.fecha_iso.split("-");
        const [hh, mm] = (e.hora || "00:00").split(":");
        const startH = parseInt(hh) || 0;
        const startM = parseInt(mm) || 0;
        const endH = startH + 1;
        dtstart = `DTSTART;TZID=America/Mexico_City:${yr}${mo}${dy}T${String(startH).padStart(2,"0")}${String(startM).padStart(2,"0")}00`;
        dtend = `DTEND;TZID=America/Mexico_City:${yr}${mo}${dy}T${String(endH).padStart(2,"0")}${String(startM).padStart(2,"0")}00`;
      } else if (e.fecha_iso) {
        const [yr, mo, dy] = e.fecha_iso.split("-");
        dtstart = `DTSTART;VALUE=DATE:${yr}${mo}${dy}`;
        dtend = `DTEND;VALUE=DATE:${yr}${mo}${dy}`;
      } else {
        continue;
      }

      ical.push("BEGIN:VEVENT");
      ical.push(`UID:${uid}`);
      ical.push(`DTSTAMP:${new Date().toISOString().replace(/[-:]/g, "").split(".")[0]}Z`);
      ical.push(dtstart);
      ical.push(dtend);
      ical.push(`SUMMARY:${summary}`);
      if (location) ical.push(`LOCATION:${location}`);
      if (description) ical.push(`DESCRIPTION:${description}`);
      if (url) ical.push(`URL:${url}`);
      ical.push("END:VEVENT");
    }

    ical.push("END:VCALENDAR");
    const icalString = ical.join("\r\n");

    // Expose for testing
    window.__lastIcalString = icalString;

    // Trigger download
    const blob = new Blob([icalString], { type: "text/calendar;charset=utf-8" });
    const url2 = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
    const a = document.createElement("a");
    a.href = url2;
    a.download = "eventos-cdmx.ics";
    document.body.appendChild(a);
    a.click();
    document.body.removeChild(a);
    URL.revokeObjectURL(url2);
  }

  const badge = htl.html`<div class="selected-count"></div>`;
  const btn = htl.html`<button class="export-btn" style="display:none" onclick=${generateICal}>📅 Exportar a iCal</button>`;

  return htl.html`<div class="selection-widget">${badge}${btn}</div>`;
}
```

```{ojs}
htl.html`<div class="event-count">${filtered.length} evento${filtered.length !== 1 ? "s" : ""} encontrado${filtered.length !== 1 ? "s" : ""}</div>`
```

# Eventos Culturales CDMX

```{ojs}
// ── 6. Table with poster images (no checkboxes - selection via separate mechanism) ──
eventsTable = {
  const rows = filtered.map((e, idx) => {
    const poster = (e.banner_url && e.detail_url)
      ? htl.html`<a href="${e.detail_url}" target="_blank"><img src="${e.banner_url}" class="event-poster" loading="lazy"></a>`
      : "";
    const link = e.detail_url
      ? htl.html`<a href="${e.detail_url}" target="_blank" class="ver-link">Ver →</a>`
      : "";
    const infoHtml = (e.info_text || "").replace(/\s*\|\s*/g, "<br>");
    return htl.html`<tr data-idx="${idx}">
      <td class="col-check"><input type="checkbox" data-idx="${idx}"></td>
      <td class="col-poster">${poster}</td>
      <td class="col-evento">${e.evento || ""}</td>
      <td class="col-fecha">${e.fecha_iso ? e.fecha_iso.split("-").reverse().join("/") : ""}</td>
      <td class="col-hora">${e.hora || ""}</td>
      <td class="col-recinto">${e.recinto || ""}</td>
      <td class="col-info">${infoHtml}</td>
      <td class="col-location">${e.location || ""}</td>
      <td class="col-link">${link}</td>
    </tr>`;
  });

  // Store filtered data globally for iCal export
  window.__eventSelection = window.__eventSelection || { selected: new Set(), lastLen: 0, filtered: [] };
  if (filtered.length !== window.__eventSelection.lastLen) {
    window.__eventSelection.selected = new Set();
    window.__eventSelection.lastLen = filtered.length;
  }
  window.__eventSelection.filtered = filtered;

  const table = htl.html`<div class="table-wrapper">
    <table id="events-table">
      <thead><tr>
        <th class="col-check"><input type="checkbox" id="master-checkbox"></th>
        <th>Poster</th>
        <th>Evento</th>
        <th>Fecha</th>
        <th>Hora</th>
        <th>Recinto</th>
        <th>Info</th>
        <th>Ubicación</th>
        <th>Enlace</th>
      </tr></thead>
      <tbody>${rows}</tbody>
    </table>
  </div>`;

  // Attach event handlers after DOM insertion
  setTimeout(() => {
    const state = window.__eventSelection;
    
    function updateUI() {
      const count = state.selected.size;
      const badge = document.querySelector(".selected-count");
      const btn = document.querySelector(".export-btn");
      if (badge) badge.textContent = count > 0 ? `${count} evento${count !== 1 ? "s" : ""} seleccionado${count !== 1 ? "s" : ""}` : "";
      if (btn) btn.style.display = count > 0 ? "block" : "none";
      if (btn) btn.textContent = `📅 Exportar a iCal (${count})`;
      
      const master = document.getElementById("master-checkbox");
      if (master) master.checked = count === state.lastLen && state.lastLen > 0;
    }

    // Row checkbox handlers
    document.querySelectorAll("#events-table tbody input[type=checkbox]").forEach(cb => {
      cb.addEventListener("change", function() {
        const idx = parseInt(this.dataset.idx);
        if (this.checked) state.selected.add(idx);
        else state.selected.delete(idx);
        this.closest("tr").classList.toggle("row-selected", this.checked);
        updateUI();
      });
    });

    // Row click handler
    document.querySelectorAll("#events-table tbody tr").forEach(tr => {
      tr.addEventListener("click", function(ev) {
        if (ev.target.tagName === "INPUT" || ev.target.tagName === "A" || ev.target.closest("a")) return;
        const cb = this.querySelector("input[type=checkbox]");
        cb.checked = !cb.checked;
        cb.dispatchEvent(new Event("change"));
      });
    });

    // Master checkbox handler
    const master = document.getElementById("master-checkbox");
    if (master) {
      master.addEventListener("change", function() {
        const checked = this.checked;
        state.selected = checked ? new Set([...Array(state.lastLen).keys()]) : new Set();
        document.querySelectorAll("#events-table tbody input[type=checkbox]").forEach(cb => {
          cb.checked = checked;
          cb.closest("tr").classList.toggle("row-selected", checked);
        });
        updateUI();
      });
    }

    updateUI();
  }, 0);

  return table;
}
```
